name: overlord
description: Chat-driven access to Overlord ticket protocol workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Run Overlord ticket protocol commands from chat
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex chat directly to a local Overlord workspace through the existing `ovld protocol` CLI. The plugin exposes ticket session, progress update, context, delivery, artifact, and follow-up ticket tools so users can drive Overlord workflows conversationally.
defaultPrompt: Attach to Overlord ticket 123 and summarize context
Post an execute update to this Overlord ticket
Deliver this Overlord ticket with artifacts
